title: Reset Button — Full Live Re-Render
summary: Reset Everything to Default now re-renders group-chat rooms, DM closets, ambient particles, and the header-avatar ring particles immediately after wiping settings — not just on next navigation.

changes.description: After clearing cp2p_room_bg_* localStorage keys, _applyRoomBg(currentRoom) is now explicitly called so the active room's background reverts to default in the live DOM without requiring a page reload or room switch.
After clearing cp2p_closet_tint_* localStorage keys, _applyClosetTint(currentRoom) is now explicitly called so the active DM closet tint is removed from #messages instantly.
_destroyParticlesForKey('room_ambient_' + currentRoom) is now called during reset to immediately cancel any running ambient particle canvas in the active room.
_handleOwnRingParticles('none') is now called during reset to cancel the header-avatar ring-particles canvas if the ring-particles preset was previously active.
